name: Residency Journal Compliance Audit
description: When a note HTML file is saved, checks it against Residency Journal style rules

then.prompt:
A Residency Journal note was just saved. Audit it against STYLE_GUIDE.md rules:
1. Does it have a Brutal Rule box on page 1?
2. Is the footer pinned with margin-top:auto on a height:297mm flex column (not min-height)?
3. Are section numbers sequential across all pages (never reset per page)?
4. Are there any paragraphs outside description boxes?
5. Are there any banned words from STYLE_GUIDE.md §2?
6. Are there any em dashes?
7. Do all description boxes have the gold left border and correct background?
8. Are the 4 tabs present (Foundations / Presentation / Management / MCQ)?
Report each issue with the line number and exact fix needed. If everything passes, say 'AUDIT PASSED'.
